info.title: TypeContractor.Tool
info.description:
Provides a dotnet tool for generating TypeScript
			definitions from an ASP.NET Core API.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Tool for generating TypeScript definitions from C# code

options.name: --assembly
options.description: Path to the assembly to start with. Will be relative to the current directory [default: ]

options.name: --output
options.description: Output path to write to. Will be relative to the current directory [default: ]

options.name: --root
options.description: Relative root for generating cleaner imports. For example '~/api' [default: ]

options.name: --clean
options.description: Choose how to clean up no longer relevant type files in output directory. Danger! [default: Smart]

options.name: --replace
options.description: Provide one replacement in the form '<search>:<replace>'. Can be repeated [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --strip
options.description: Provide a prefix to strip out of types. Can be repeated [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --custom-map
options.description: Provide a custom type map in the form '<from>:<to>'. Can be repeated [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --packs-path
options.description: Path where dotnet is installed and reference assemblies can be found. [default: C:\Program Files\dotnet\packs\]

options.name: --dotnet-version
options.description: Major version of dotnet to look for [default: 10]

options.name: --build-zod-schemas
options.description: Enable experimental support for Zod schemas alongside generated types. [default: False]

options.name: --generate-api-clients
options.description: Enable experimental support for auto-generating API clients for each endpoint. [default: False]

options.name: --api-client-template
options.description: Template to use for API clients. Either 'aurelia', 'react-axios' (built-in) or a path to a Handlebars file, including extension [default: aurelia]

options.name: --casing
options.description: Casing to use for generated file names [default: Kebab]
